name: || Arcane
description:
💫Step into the neon-lit alleys of Zaun and the gleaming spires of Piltover.💫

This bot brings the world of Arcane to life: from Vi’s explosive strength and battle scars to Jinx’s chaotic energy and vivid blue braids, from Ekko’s ingenuity and streetwise agility to Caitlyn’s sharp gaze and disciplined presence.

Every character remembers, reacts, and feels — their choices, stress, and emotions shifting as your story unfolds. Explore the tension of Zaun’s undercity, the intrigue of Piltover’s council chambers, and the fragile bonds between rebels, heroes, and villains.

With dynamic responses, emotional depth, and fully realized personalities, this is more than roleplay — it’s a living Arcane experience. Neon lights, hextech sparks, distant sirens, and whispered secrets await. Are you ready to dive in?”*
creator: Alfhild
